authors: Henning Eichler Bernadette Uth Hannah Ötting Vanessa Kokoschka a Professor
raw_title: Debate Spaces for Everyone? How Public Service Media Aim to Reshape Audience Engagement and Interactions
title_en: Debate Spaces for Everyone? How Public Service Media Aim to Reshape Audience Engagement and Interactions
title_zh: 人人可参与的辩论空间？公共服务媒体如何重塑受众参与和互动
plain_summary_zh: 这篇研究探讨公共服务媒体如何创建更包容的在线辩论空间，让更多普通民众参与讨论，而不是只有少数专家或活跃用户。它关注媒体机构如何设计平台和内容来促进健康的公众对话。
plain_summary_en: This research examines how public service media organizations are creating more inclusive online debate spaces that allow broader public participation, rather than just experts or active users. It focuses on how media institutions design platforms and content to foster healthy public dialogue.
research_direction_zh: 数字时代公共服务媒体的角色转型与公众参与机制创新
research_direction_en: Role transformation of public service media in the digital age and innovation in public participation mechanisms
